plugins.name: kernel
plugins.description: Durable project memory, bounded JSON handoffs, engineering workflows, and independent verification for Claude Code and Codex. KERNEL 8.5.2 fixes the config guard misfiring on harness session data (~/.claude/projects). 8.5.1 adds a learning graph over AgentDB memory (semantic edges + recurring-failure promotion to doctrine candidates), on top of 8.5.0 marketing/frontend skills, 8.4.0 lean session start, 8.3.0 local semantic recall, and the 8.2.0 six-threat security guard.
